posts.title: DC06PE11
posts.text: 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829#include "allinclude.h" //DO NOT edit this lineTElemType PreOrderKHelper(BiTree T, int* k){ if(T == NULL || *k <= 0)​ return '#'; if (--(*k) == 0)​ return T->data; TElemType left = PreOrderKHelper(T->lchild, k); if (*k == 0)​ return left; return PreOrderKHelper(T->rchild, k);}TElemType PreOrderK(BiTree T, int k) { return PreOrderKHelper(T, &k);}

posts.title: 数据结构anywiew第六章
posts.text: 题目序号DC06PE02123456789101112131415#include "allinclude.h"Status is_Desendant(SqBiTree T, int u, int v) { // Add your code here if(v>T.lastIndex || u>T.lastIndex || v<=u || u<1 || v<1) return FALSE;while (v>u) { if (v/2==u) { return TRUE; } v/=2;}return FALSE;}
